response.justification: The candidate shows 15+ years of hands-on full-stack work with sustained, recent use of the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK) and current professional experience building AI-agent infrastructure including MCP tooling, which directly matches a rare requirement. A deep testing culture (TDD, test-runner and assertion-library authorship, testing workshops) and demonstrated architecture range from low-latency microservices to Kubernetes-deployed platforms make them a strong fit; the main gaps are no stated Nest.js or Kotlin experience.
strengths: Long, recent full-stack track record in TypeScript/Node.js/React with cloud (AWS) and container (Docker/Kubernetes) deployment
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) in current role
Exceptional testing depth: TDD practice, authored test frameworks, and taught testing/Selenium courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and limited (robotics tooling ~2016-2018)
Testing tools listed in JD (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) not explicitly named, though equivalent expertise is evident
